purpose: Controlled readiness stress tests, malformed-input handling, determinism checks, and risk-summary metrics.

comparison_cases.name: Remove monitoring from an approved system
comparison_cases.change: Changed has_monitoring from true to false.

findings.message: Post-launch monitoring is not defined.
findings.recommended_action: Add quality, failure, latency, and drift monitoring.

comparison_cases.name: Enable sensitive-content logging
comparison_cases.change: Changed logs_sensitive_content from false to true.

findings.message: Sensitive content may be written to logs.
findings.recommended_action: Redact or disable sensitive-content logging.

comparison_cases.name: Add safeguards to the clinical support proposal
comparison_cases.change: Added human review, abstention, monitoring, rollback, prompt-injection checks, ownership, latency target, and stronger evidence.

findings.message: Sensitive content may be written to logs.
findings.recommended_action: Redact or disable sensitive-content logging.

findings.message: The system has no clear abstention or uncertainty behavior.
findings.recommended_action: Add a safe fallback when evidence is weak or missing.

findings.message: Prompt-injection or instruction-conflict checks are missing.
findings.recommended_action: Add input screening and instruction-boundary tests.

findings.message: Post-launch monitoring is not defined.
findings.recommended_action: Add quality, failure, latency, and drift monitoring.

findings.message: No latency target is defined.
findings.recommended_action: Set and measure an acceptable response-time target.

findings.message: Evidence is usable but still limited.
findings.recommended_action: Expand evaluation coverage and document remaining gaps.

comparison_cases.name: Add safeguards to the financial proposal
comparison_cases.change: Added human review, citations, abstention, monitoring, rollback, access controls, prompt-injection checks, ownership, latency target, and stronger evidence.

findings.message: Sensitive data is used without access controls.
findings.recommended_action: Add role-based access controls before launch.

findings.message: Sensitive content may be written to logs.
findings.recommended_action: Redact or disable sensitive-content logging.

findings.message: A high-impact workflow has no required human review.
findings.recommended_action: Require qualified human review for consequential decisions.

findings.message: Outputs are not tied to inspectable source evidence.
findings.recommended_action: Add source references or evidence traces.

findings.message: The system has no clear abstention or uncertainty behavior.
findings.recommended_action: Add a safe fallback when evidence is weak or missing.

findings.message: Prompt-injection or instruction-conflict checks are missing.
findings.recommended_action: Add input screening and instruction-boundary tests.

findings.message: Post-launch monitoring is not defined.
findings.recommended_action: Add quality, failure, latency, and drift monitoring.

findings.message: No rollback plan is documented.
findings.recommended_action: Define rollback triggers and a recovery procedure.

findings.message: No accountable system owner is listed.
findings.recommended_action: Assign an owner for incidents, reviews, and updates.

findings.message: Evidence quality is too weak for the proposed use.
findings.recommended_action: Collect stronger evaluation evidence before launch.

comparison_cases.name: Complete the agent workflow safeguards
comparison_cases.change: Added rollback planning, a latency target, and stronger evidence.

findings.message: No rollback plan is documented.
findings.recommended_action: Define rollback triggers and a recovery procedure.

findings.message: No latency target is defined.
findings.recommended_action: Set and measure an acceptable response-time target.

findings.message: Evidence is usable but still limited.
findings.recommended_action: Expand evaluation coverage and document remaining gaps.

validation_errors: Field evidence_quality must be weak, medium, or strong.
Field has_monitoring must be bool, not str.
Proposal must be a JSON object.
